dialogue_text: and that is to go to the land of the Winkies, seek out the Wicked Witch, and destroy her.
source_excerpt: "There is only one thing we can do," returned the Lion, "and that is to go to the land of the Winkies, seek out the Wicked Witch, and destroy her."
